The redemption date for the Preferred Stock and related Depositary Shares is October 30, 2023 (the “Redemption Date”). title: Citi LIBOR Transition Update
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On June 30, 2023 (the “Cessation Date”), ICE Benchmark Administration (“IBA”) ceased publication of all ICE Swap Rate settings based on USD LIBOR. This cessation followed the announcement by the UK Financial Conduct Authority on March 5, 2021, that all USD LIBOR settings would either cease or no longer be representative after the Cessation Date. title: Bank stocks gain after jobs report in rebound from August losses

The KBW Nasdaq Bank Index BKX, +1.27% rose by 1.2%, the Financial Select Sector SPDR ETF XLF, +0.80% rose 0.7% and the SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF KRE, +1.48% rose 1.7%.
